title: [F] Setting a default Style at Worksheet level to avoid applying the same style for all columns
author: pradeepassrr
body:
## 🚀 Feature Proposal

Feature to set the Font family, size, weight and other Styling while creating a worksheet.

## Motivation

Other features are very well done which made me to think of this missing feature when more data is there for the cells.

## Example

Not required.
